channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Repeated rubbish, 24th March
item.description:
The post office and surrounding area are consistently covered in rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mecklenburgh Street, 24th March
item.description:
Metal barrier for cycles only, barrier lock removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Mecklenburgh Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 24th March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned. Has no front number plate. And number plate on the rear of the vehicle is for another car. Has been reported before - over 6 weeks ago and car still there. Please remove it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brabourn Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped furniture outside Marlow House, 24th March
item.description:
A pile of fly-tipped furniture, including broken drawers and cabinet panels, has been dumped on the pavement outside Marlow House (by the entrance doors). The items are obstructing part of the pavement and could pose a hazard to pedestrians. The waste appears to have uncollected for a while now . Please arrange for removal as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes that haven’t moved in years, 24th March
item.description:
Hello! I have emailed the council before about bike parking and clearing this would help with the issue. It’s a bike graveyard that is calling for thief’s to take anything. Please help clear this up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartlake Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water filled pot holes filled with rubbish, 24th March
item.description:
Become boggy with rubbish and waterlogged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By 13 Harvist Road, 24th March
item.description:
Regular flytipping seen outside this house, looks messy and it is in public footpath. Also two doors down a lot of trash on the street from a broken trash bag I assume.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Abandoned e-bikes, 24th March
item.description:
Overcrowded abandoned bikes blocking pavement outside Caffe Concerto Haymarket
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 225/229, Piccadilly, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Town map missing, 24th March
item.description:
Side has been missing for months. Needs replacing or removing. Think this is TfL? If they don’t have spares these should be replaced with LBB owned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged speed limit signb, 24th March
item.description:
Post leaning plates all twisted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple tags, 24th March
item.description:
Multiple tags on the recycling bins and signs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on street, 24th March
item.description:
There is rubbish on the pavement, possibly related to the bin there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Turney Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No block cleaner, 24th March
item.description:
When is our stairs and lift going to cleaned there disgusting haven’t seen them cleaned in weeks!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No cleaner, 24th March
item.description:
This spoon which has been used by local drug addicts has been here for over a week , also dog poo bags left on fence also been here for at least two weeks , where is our estate cleaner , only time I see cleaner is when he walks up and down doing nothing, something needs to change residents are wondering what they are paying for ,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped in street, 24th March
item.description:
There is litter and bags of rubbish all over the road that needs to be picked up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Generator producing excessive smoke, 24th March
item.description:
There’s a generator that produces a lot of black smoke

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anax Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak in parking lot, 24th March
item.description:
There has been water flowing from this parking lot for a number of weeks. The water stinks and the pavement is getting slippery from the constant flow. I would like to know when this problem is going to be fixed!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartlake Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large paint tub dumped on pavement, 24th March
item.description:
There is internal decorating being carried out in the flat above the Candy Box. As a result a large trade plastic paint tub has been dumped at the usual flytipping hot spot at the side of the Candy Box in Maple Crescent. Please can this be removed and a more robust enforcement is required in this area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Maple Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish strewing everywhere, 24th March
item.description:
This rubbish has been here for a while now. Not picked up by Hackney council on previous pallet pick up. Vermin foxes causing health safety issues

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House hold waste dumped on pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Primrose Avenue EN2 Primrose Hall Household waste dumped on pavement. Foxes have now ripped the bags open and the rubbish has spilled out into the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavender Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
